model: CNN(MobileNetV3-small, frozen) ⊕ YOLOv8-pose(51-d) + LSTM, image+pose early-fusion, T=5
selection: best epoch by val macro-F1 (same criterion as R3D-18)
split: cross-subject group_split seed42 val/test .15 (same as R3D-18 & image-only)
pose: yolov8s-pose, 17 COCO kpts × [x_norm, y_norm, conf], top-conf person
note: Image+pose early fusion. Frozen MobileNetV3 backbone + YOLOv8-pose keypoints; only LSTM trained. RGB-cam deployable (no Kinect).
